summary_en: ＴＰＲ authorized a share buyback. Direct return of capital and a signal management views shares as undervalued.
summary_jp: ＴＰＲが自己株式取得を決議。資本還元と株価評価のシグナル。

summary_en: ＴＰＲ announced a material dividend change (dividend hike). Reframes the return-of-capital baseline.
summary_jp: ＴＰＲが配当方針変更を開示（増配）。資本還元基準が刷新。
